name: ExtensionAuditEvent_Source_Site
title: R5: site additional types
description: R5: `AuditEvent.source.site` additional types (Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)) additional types from child elements (identifier)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `AuditEvent.source.site` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`AuditEvent.source.site` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `AuditEvent.source.site` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location)`
*  R4B: `AuditEvent.source.site` 0..1 `string`
*  R4: `AuditEvent.source.site` 0..1 `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `AuditEvent.source.site` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `AuditEvent.source.site` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `AuditEvent.source.site` do not cover the following types: Reference.
The mappings for `AuditEvent.source.site` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: identifier.

element.short: Logical source location within the enterprise
element.definition: Logical source location within the healthcare enterprise network.  For example, a hospital or other provider location within a multi-entity provider group.
